title: berkheya rhapontica subsp. aristosa
intro: Berkheya rhapontica subsp. aristosa is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the aristate berkheya or aristate berkheya daisy. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea. The herbal preparations of Berkheya rhapontica subsp. aristosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
